testcase.name: whenAuthenticatingWithValidCredentials_thenReturnTokenAndAccessSecureRoutes

testcase.name: whenAccessingSecureEndpointWithoutToken_thenUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Securing GET /secure 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG c.c.j.s.JwtAuthenticationFilter - Intercepting request for path: '/secure' 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG c.c.j.s.JwtAuthenticationFilter - No Bearer token found in request headers. 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter - Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] ERROR c.c.j.security.SecurityConfig - Unauthorized access attempt to '/secure' - Exception: Full authentication is required to access this resource 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] ERROR c.c.j.e.GlobalExceptionHandler - Authentication exception: Full authentication is required to access this resource. Path: /secure

testcase.name: whenAuthenticatingWithInvalidCredentials_thenUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Securing POST /authenticate 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG c.c.j.s.JwtAuthenticationFilter - Intercepting request for path: '/authenticate' 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG c.c.j.s.JwtAuthenticationFilter - No Bearer token found in request headers. 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter - Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Secured POST /authenticate 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] INFO c.c.j.c.AuthenticationController - Received authentication request for user: 'admin' 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.s.a.d.DaoAuthenticationProvider - Failed to authenticate since password does not match stored value 2026-06-29 22:42:58 [main] ERROR c.c.j.e.GlobalExceptionHandler - Authentication failed: Bad credentials. Path: /authenticate
